items.h: Ring Of Honor's Return To 2300 Arena Announced For Upcoming Pay-Per-View
items.p: Last year, AEW held a multi-week residency at the historic 2300 Arena for episodes of "Dynamite" and "Collision" alongside an ROH pay-per-view and tapings.

items.h: ROH Death Before Dishonor Announced For August 21
items.p: ROH Death Before Dishonor returns. Ring of Honor Wrestling announced that ROH Death Before Dishonor will take place on Friday, August 21 at the 2300 Arena in Philadelphia, PA. This will be the...

items.h: MVP Makes Controversial Pick For Favorite Match
items.p: AEW's MVP has named the three favorite matches of his career, with two of them coming against a controversial wrestler.

items.h: Chris Jericho 'Couldn't Be Having More Fun' Since AEW Return
items.p: AEW's Chris Jericho has spoken positively about his return to the promotion since April, explaining what he has liked most.

items.h: Jake ‘The Snake’ Roberts Announces AEW Departure
items.p: Jake Roberts finishes up with AEW. There’s a new interview with Jake ‘The Snake’ Roberts that was posted by Bill Apter. During the interview, Roberts revealed that he’s no longer employed by All...
